summary: Vocabulary feature P0 fix fully verified. All backend tests (15/15) PASSED. All frontend features working correctly: vocabulary list display, manual word addition via dialog, search filter, delete functionality, and empty state. The save_vocabulary tool is properly defined in MAIN_AGENT_TOOLS with correct schema and the tool_executor handler correctly saves words to DB with duplicate detection.

tests: save_vocabulary has correct schema (word and definition required)
Handler correctly looks up user_id from conversation
Handler saves word to vocabulary collection
Tutor prompt includes automatic saving instruction
Vocabulary list displays saved words with definition and example
Add Word dialog opens and form fields work
Save Word button creates new vocabulary entry
Toast notification shows 'Word saved to vocabulary!'
Delete button removes word and shows 'Word removed' toast
Empty state shows when no words exist
Empty state has 'Add First Word' and 'Practice Instead' buttons

critical_code_review_comments: CORRECT: save_vocabulary tool has proper schema with 'word' and 'definition' as required fields
CORRECT: Tool executor handler looks up user_id from conversations collection using conversation_id
CORRECT: Duplicate detection uses case-insensitive regex match
CORRECT: VocabularyPage has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
CORRECT: Empty state displays when vocabulary list is empty
seed_data_creation: Test user vocabtest2@example.com created during testing. Vocabulary data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vocabulary P0 fix verified. Key implementation: 1) save_vocabulary tool in MAIN_AGENT_TOOLS with word/definition required, 2) tool_executor handler at lines 102-131 saves to vocabulary collection with duplicate detection, 3) System prompt instructs agent to automatically save words, 4) VocabularyPage frontend works with all CRUD operations and proper data-testid attributes.
